semantic_context: This document is a formal notification of a debt repayment. It usually arrives as an email body with a PDF attachment, or a PDF containing a cover letter and a transaction table.

lender_name.description: The financial institution issuing the notice.

total_amount.description: The total sum of the payment including principal and interest.

effective_date.description: The date the funds are applied to the loan balance.

transactions.description: A list of individual line items (Principal, Interest, Fees).
